1.identification: P.D. v/l less than 50 m underway seen From port side.
1.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
1.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs interval in between.

2.identification: P.D. v/l seen end on - a) Probably 50 m. or more underway. b) less than 50 m. towing or pushing underway two 200 m. or less.
2.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
2.fog_signal: a) Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. interval in between.

3.identification: P.D. v/l less than 50 m underway seen end on
3.action: One short blast, a/c to stbd.
3.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. interval in between.

4.identification: P.D. v/l less than 50 m underway seen From Stbd side.
4.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs interval in between.

5.identification: P.D. v/l less than 50 m or more underway seen from stbd side.
5.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast Snopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs intervat in between.

6.identification: P.D. v/l less than 50 m or more underway seen from stbd side.
6.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
6.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast Snopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs intervat in between.

7.identification: a) v/I probably 50 m. or more but less than 100 m. at anchor, seen from ahead or astern. b) P.D. v/I probably 50 m. or more underway seen end on, out of range of side lignts. c) P.D. v/I towing or pushing less than 50 m. underway, tow 200 m. or less, out of range of side lights.
7.action: a) & b) One short blast a/c to stbd. c) As per side light when sighted.
7.day_signal: a) A bali in fore part. b) & c) No day signal.

8.identification: a) v/I probably 50 m. or more but less than 100 m. at anchor, seen from port side. b) P.D. v/I probably 50 m. or more underway seen from stbd side out of range of side lights.
8.action: a) One short blast a/c to stbd. b) Maintain course and speed.
8.day_signal: a) A bali in fore part. b) No day signal.
8.fog_signal: a) Rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Additional - Short. prolonged and short blasts may be sounded. b) Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 sects. interval in between.

9.identification: a) P.D. v/I or S.V. underway seen from astern. b) P.D. v/I less than 50 m. underway out of range of side lights. c) All - round light of : i) v/I less than 50 m. at anchor. ii) v/I under oars. iii) P.D. v/I less than 12 m., speed not exceeding 7 knots. iv) P.D. v/I less than 12m., out of range side lights. v) Sailing v/I less than 7 m.
9.action: a) One short blast a/c stbd. b) As per side light when sighted. c) i), ii) & v) One short blast a/c to stbd. iii) Port blow- Maintain course and speed. Right ahead & stbd bow- One short blast a/c to stbd. iv) As per side light when sighted.
9.day_signal: Anchored v/I - One ball in fore part. Others - No day signal.

10.identification: Air - cushion v/I less than 50 m. in non - displacement mode underway seen end on.
10.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
10.fog_signal: one prolonged blast. (v/I assumed to be making way)

11.identification: Air - cushion v/I less than 50 m. in non - displacement mode underway seen from stbd side.
11.fog_signal: one prolonged blast. (v/I assumed to be making way)

12.identification: Air - cushion v/I less than 50 m. in non - displacement mode underway seen from port side.
12.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
12.fog_signal: one prolonged blast. (v/I assumed to be making way)

13.identification: a) Air - cushion v/I in non - displacement mode underway seen from astern. b) Air - cushion v/I less than 12 m. in non - displacement mode underway out of range of side lights.
13.action: a) One short blast a/c to stbd. b) As per side light when sighted.
13.fog_signal: one prolonged blast. (v/I assumed to be making way.)

14.identification: a) Air - cushion v/I in non - displacement mode underway seen from astern. b) Air - cushion v/I less than 12 m. in non - displacement mode underway out of range of side lights. seen from stbd. side.
14.action: a) One short blast a/c to stbd. b) Maintain course and speed.
14.fog_signal: one prolonged blast. (v/I assumed to be making way.)

15.identification: a) Air - cushion v/I in non - displacement mode underway seen from astern. b) Air - cushion v/I less than 12 m. in non - displacement mode underway out of range of side lights. seen from stbd. side.
15.action: a) Two short blast a/c to stbd. b) One short blast a/c to stbd.
15.fog_signal: one prolonged blast. (v/I assumed to be making way.)

16.identification: a) P.D. v/I less than 20 m. underway, seen end on. b) P.D. v/I less than 12 m. underway, mast head it. displaced from centre line, line, seen end on.
16.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
16.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. interval in between.

17.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
17.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

34.fog_signal: Towing v/I - One prolonged and two short blasts. Towed v/I - One prolonged and three short blasts.

52.identification: Inconspicuous partly submerged v/I or object or their combination towed, breadth less than 25 m., lenth 100 m. or less.
52.action: Action according to position of tug.
52.day_signal: One diamond at or near aftermost extremity of last v/I or object. If tow exceeds 200 m., one additional diamond forward.

55.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

56.day_signal: a) No day signal. b) If length of tow exceeds 200 m. a diamond.
56.fog_signal: a) One prolonged and two short blasts. b) One prolonged and three short blasts.

150.identification: a) Aground v/I less than 50 m. b) N.U.C. v/I making way seen from astern.
150.action: a) One short blast a/c to stbd. b) One short blast a/c to stbd, reverse course inform master.
150.day_signal: a) Two balls in vertical line. b) Three balls in vertical line.
150.fog_signal: a) One prolonged and two short blasts. b) Three stokes on bell before and after rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Also may sound two short and one prolonged blasts.

151.identification: a) Aground v/I less than 50 m. b) N.U.C. v/I making way seen from astern.

151.fog_signal: a) One prolonged and two short blasts. b) Three stokes on bell before and after rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Also may sound short and one prolonged blasts.

152.identification: a) Aground v/I less than 50 m. b) N.U.C. v/I making way seen from astern.

152.day_signal: a) Two balls in vertical line. b) Three balls in vertical line.
152.fog_signal: a) One prolonged and two short blasts. b) Three stokes on bell before and after rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Also may sound two short and one prolonged blasts.

204.identification: Dredger R.A.M. with obstruction on port side making way seen from astern.
204.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
204.day_signal: Ball, diamond and ball in vertical line. Also two diamonds in vertical line on safe side and two balls in vertical line on obstruction side.
204.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

205.identification: Dredger / uwo R.A.M. with obstruction on stbd side making way seen from astern.
205.action: Two short blasts a/c to port.
205.day_signal: Ball, diamond and ball in vertical line. Also two diamonds in vertical line on safe side and two balls in vertical line on obstruction side.
205.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

206.identification: Dredger R.A.M. with obstruction on port side making way seen from astern.
206.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
206.day_signal: Ball, diamond and ball in vertical line. Also two diamonds in vertical line on safe side and two balls in vertical line on obstruction side.
206.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts. / uwo

207.identification: Dredger R.A.M. with obstruction underway but stopped or at anchor.
207.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
207.day_signal: Ball, diamond and ball in vertical line. Also two diamonds in vertical line on safe side and two balls in vertical line on obstruction side.
207.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts. / uwo

208.identification: a) v/I R.A.M. or dredger / uwo without obstruction underway but stopped. b) Small v/I engaged in diving operations.
208.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
208.day_signal: a) Ball, diamond and ball in vertical line. b) Rigid flag A.
208.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

209.identification: Mine clearance v/I less than 50 m. underway seen end on.
209.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and pass more than 1000 m.
209.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard.
209.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

210.identification: Mine clearance v/I less than 50 m. underway seen form stbd side.
210.action: Two short blasts a/c to port and pass more than 1000 m.
210.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard.
210.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

211.identification: Mine clearance v/I less than 50 m. underway seen form port side.
211.action: One short blast a/c to stbd. and pass more than 1000 m.
211.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard.
211.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

212.identification: Mine clearance v/I probably 50 m. or more underway seen end on.
212.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and pass more than 1000 m.
212.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard.
212.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

213.action: Two short blasts a/c to stbd and pass more than 1000 m.
213.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard.
213.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

214.identification: Mine clearance v/I probably 50 m. or more underway seen from port side.
214.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and pass more than 1000 m.
214.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard.
214.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

215.identification: Mine clearance v/I underway seen from astern or less than 50 m. at anchor.
215.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and pass more than 1000 m.
215.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard. Also it at anchor, a ball in fore part.
215.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

216.identification: Mine clearance v/I underway seen from astern or less than 50 m. at anchor.
216.action: Two short blasts a/c to port and pass more than 1000 m.
216.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard. Also it at anchor, a ball in fore part.
216.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

217.identification: Mine clearance v/I underway seen from astern or less than 50 m. at anchor.
217.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and pass more than 1000 m.
217.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard. Also it at anchor, a ball in fore part.
217.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

218.identification: Mine clearance v/I probably 50 m. or more but less than 100 m. at anchor, seen from port side.
218.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and pass more than 1000 m.
218.day_signal: Three balls - one at foremast head and one at each end of fore yard. Also a ball in fore part.
218.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

219.identification: v/I C.B.D. less than 50 m. underway seen end on.
219.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
219.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

220.identification: v/I C.B.D. less than 50 m. underway seen from stbd side.
220.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and go round her stern.
220.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

221.identification: v/I C.B.D. less than 50 m. underway seen from port side.
221.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
221.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

222.identification: v/I C.B.D. probably 50 m. or more underway seen end on.
222.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
222.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

224.identification: v/I C.B.D. probably 50 m. underway seen port side.
224.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
224.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

223.identification: v/I C.B.D. probably 50 m. or more underway seen from stbd side.
223.action: One short blast a/c to stbd and go round her stern.
223.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

225.identification: v/I C.B.D. underway seen from astern.
225.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
225.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

226.identification: v/I C.B.D. underway seen from astern.
226.action: Two short blasts a/c to port.
226.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

227.identification: v/I C.B.D. underway seen from astern.
227.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
227.fog_signal: One prolonged and two short blasts.

228.identification: Pilot vessel underway seen end on.
228.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
228.day_signal: Flag H. (As per Int. Code of Signals).
228.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blasts. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. Interval in between. Additional - Four short blasts may be sounded.

229.identification: Pilot vessel underway seen from stbd side
229.day_signal: Flag H. (As per Int. Code of Signals).
229.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. Interval in between. Additional - Four short blasts may be sounded.

230.identification: Pilot vessel underway seen from port side
230.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
230.day_signal: Flag H. (As per Int. Code of Signals).
230.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. Interval in between. Additional - Four short blasts may be sounded.

231.identification: Pilot vessel underway seen from astern or less than 50 m. at anchor.
231.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
231.day_signal: Flag H. (As per Int. Code of Signals). Also if at anchor, a ball in fore part.
231.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. Interval in between. Anchored - Rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Additional - Four short blasts may be sounded.

232.identification: Pilot vessel underway seen from astern or less than 50 m. at anchor.
232.action: Two short blasts a/c to port.
232.day_signal: Flag H. (As per Int. Code of Signals). Also, if at anchor, a ball in fore part.
232.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. Interval in between. Anchored - Rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Additional - Four short blasts may be sounded.

233.identification: Pilot vessel underway seen from astern or less than 50 m. at anchor.
233.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
233.day_signal: Flag H. (As per Int. Code of Signals). Also if at anchor, a ball in fore part.
233.fog_signal: Making way - One prolonged blast. Stopped - Two prolonged blasts with 2 secs. Interval in between. Anchored - Rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Additional - Four short blasts may be sounded.

234.identification: Pilot v/I probably 50 m. or more but less than 100 m. at anchor, seen from port side.
234.action: One short blast a/c to stbd.
234.day_signal: A ball in fore part flag H. (As per Int. Code of Signals).
234.fog_signal: Rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. Additional - Four short blasts may be sounded.

235.identification: Aground v/I probably 50 m. or more, seen from port side.
235.action: One short blast a/c to stbd, reverse course and inform Master.
235.fog_signal: Less than 100 m. - Three strokes on bell before and after rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. 100 m. or more - Three strokes on bell before and after rapid ringing of bell for 5 secs. in fore part and rapid ringing of gong for 5 secs. in after par. Additional - Two short and one prolonged blasts may be sounded.
